frost_strike.name: Frost Strike
frost_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A freezing strike. Deals necrotic damage and applies [Slowed] for 3 ticks. Generates +1 Runic Pip.

death_grip.name: Death Grip
death_grip.description: Setup/Pull: A spectral hand pulls an enemy to you or pull yourself to an ally. Applies [Pinned] for 2 ticks and [Marked] for 4 ticks.

obliterate.name: Obliterate
obliterate.description: Payoff: A devastating heavy strike. Deals 3x damage to [Slowed] or [Pinned] targets. Consumes all Runic Pips to ignore enemy defense.

unholy_blight.name: Unholy Blight
unholy_blight.description: Payoff/AOE: A swarm of unholy flies plague everyone in the room. Deals massive necrotic damage over 12 ticks and applies [Decrepet] group-wide.

icebound_fortitude.name: Icebound Fortitude
icebound_fortitude.description: Defense/Reduction: Harden your blood with icy power. Reduces all incoming physical damage by 50% for 6 ticks and breaks all [Stunned] states.

anti_magic_shell.name: Anti-Magic Shell
anti_magic_shell.description: Defense/Shield: Envelop yourself in a barrier that absorbs all magical damage for 4 ticks, converting it into HP.

shambling_charge.name: Shambling Charge
shambling_charge.description: Mobility: Burst move which staggers anyone in the arrival room. Grants [Haste] for 2 ticks.

raise_ghoul.name: Raise Ghoul
raise_ghoul.description: Utility: Command the dead. Consumes 5 Runic Pips to summon a [Ghoul Follower] from a corpse in the room. The ghoul leeches health for you.

death_knight_physiology.name: Death Knight Physiology
death_knight_physiology.description: Passive: Your cold presence is overwhelming. [Slowed] applications last 50% longer and you gain 10% passive physical resistance.
